# Trinity Life Chiropractic
> Neurologically focused prenatal, pediatric, and family chiropractic care in Allen, TX.

## About
Trinity Life Chiropractic, led by Dr. Colton O'Brien, specializes in Webster Technique prenatal care, gentle pediatric adjustments, and nervous system-focused wellness care for the whole family. Located at 301 N Allen Dr, Allen, TX 75013. Phone: (214) 509-7744.

## Services
- [Pregnancy Chiropractic (Webster Technique)](/pregnancy-chiropractic-care): Certified Webster Technique care for prenatal comfort and optimal fetal positioning.
- [Pediatric Chiropractic](/pediatric-chiropractor-services): Gentle adjustments for infants and children addressing colic, sleep, ear infections, and development.
- [Family Chiropractic](/family-chiropractic): Whole-family wellness care to boost immunity, manage stress, and improve vitality.
- [Nervous System Care](/nervous-system-care): INSiGHT scanning technology for objective nervous system assessment and correction.
- [Kids & Teens](/kids-chiropractic): Care for growth spurts, sports injuries, tech neck, and school stress.
- [Wellness Care](/wellness-care): Proactive maintenance care for optimal health and aging.
- [Postpartum Recovery](/postpartum-chiropractic): Healing support for the fourth trimester.
- [ADHD & Sensory Processing](/adhd-sensory-processing): Vagus nerve focused care for focus and regulation.
- [Colic & Reflux Relief](/colic-reflux-relief): Gentle care for unsettled babies.
- [Ear Infections & Immunity](/ear-infections-immunity): Natural drainage and immune support.

## Service Areas
- Allen, TX (home office — 301 N Allen Dr)
- McKinney, TX (~10 min drive)
- Plano, TX (~15 min drive)
- Frisco, TX (~15 min drive)
- Fairview, TX (~5 min drive)
- Lucas, TX (~10 min drive)
- Murphy, TX (~10 min drive)
- Parker, TX (~15 min drive)
- Richardson, TX (~20 min drive)

## Team
- **Dr. Colton O'Brien, DC** — Founder & Lead Chiropractor. Parker University graduate. Webster Certified. ICPA Member. Specializes in pediatric developmental care and neuro-spinal adjustments.

## Office Hours
- Monday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Wednesday: Closed
- Thursday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Friday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM
- Saturday–Sunday: Closed
